visual_rule: Compact target-hit electric bloom with a white-hot flash, cyan shock edge, and clean branching spikes.
prompt: Create a transparent-background 2D battle VFX asset for Pokemon-style lightning attacks. Show only the effect element, with no character, arena, text, UI, watermark, or frame. Use a compact target-hit electric bloom with a white-hot flash core, cyan-blue outer shock, and thin branching spikes that radiate cleanly from the center. Keep it punchy, readable, and battle-ready with a strong hit-stop feel. Preserve real electric energy structure but stylize the outline and color. Output a single isolated effect element on transparency.
